benfords.explanation: Benford's Law applies to naturally occurring data. Lottery numbers are uniform random, so they should NOT follow Benford's Law.

entropy.interpretation: 100% efficiency = perfectly uniform/random. Lower values suggest some numbers appear more than others.

scratchoff_200x.verdict: 🟡 AVERAGE — Typical scratch-off value. Play for fun, not profit.
scratchoff_200x.ev_trend: 📈 IMPROVING — Current EV is higher than launch EV (more big prizes left relative to tickets).
